nasb.text: having canceled out the certificate of debt consisting of decrees against us, which was hostile to us; and He has taken it out of the way, having nailed it to the cross.

esv.text: by canceling the record of debt that stood against us with its legal demands. This he set aside, nailing it to the cross.

cnv.text: 塗抹了那寫在規條上反對我們、與我們為敵的字句，並且把這字句從我們中間拿去，釘在十字架上。

ccb.text: 撤销了指控我们违背律法的罪状，将它和基督一同钉在了十字架上，

csbs.text: 抹去了在敌对我们的那些规条中反对我们的债务记录，并且把它从中除掉，钉在十字架上。
